5944746.label: PL2500_vo_NAV_get_snp_2
5944746.transcript: However did you get here, Sir Crabington?

7538966.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
7538966.transcript: Our teamwork far outstrips that cacophony!

8574654.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
8574654.transcript: Me? A martial artist? Let me try.

11369568.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
11369568.transcript: You may not. Legends grow best when shrouded in secrecy.

12698401.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
12698401.transcript: We must head them off at the monastery!

14256738.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
14256738.transcript: I shall bring all my blades to bear!

16702023.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
16702023.transcript: Perhaps it's time we form our own Link Espécial!

25503010.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
25503010.transcript: Let's see how well Gallanza's trained his pups!

32161623.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
32161623.transcript: I'm afraid it's far too early to break for tea.

35371324.label: PL2500_vo_SP_charge_speak_1
35371324.transcript: Behold the exalted legends of yore!

36870277.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
36870277.transcript: My, what a fearsome presence you have!

38525899.label: PL2500_vo_NAV_throw_spear_reaction_1
38525899.transcript: I believe this belongs to you!

39358204.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
39358204.transcript: Levitation is a closely guarded secret of the Veil. It's nigh unbeatable!

45112422.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
45112422.transcript: True salvation comes when these skies have peace.

55387094.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
55387094.transcript: Thou hast borne witness to my especial de Maglielle!

56369120.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100
56369120.transcript: Your swordsmanship, it's a thing of beauty!

64797955.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
64797955.transcript: To think I'm able to fight alongside a living legend.

71222978.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
71222978.transcript: Look alive, dear! We've but finished the opening act!

75296919.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
75296919.transcript: My patience has run dry! Begone!

83491181.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
83491181.transcript: From you, I would expect nothing less.

84594377.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900
84594377.transcript: Id, you can always talk to me if you need to.

85533976.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2100
85533976.transcript: I was hoping for a pot of tea.

90788095.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
90788095.transcript: Apologies. I'm a tough act to follow.

95620634.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
95620634.transcript: Shall we crank up the tempo?

96835080.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
96835080.transcript: Feel free to observe the Veil's arts all you like!

107800306.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
107800306.transcript: Dame Charlotta, might I have done something to upset you?

119944390.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
119944390.transcript: Oh, I see you've earned your title, Star-Sword Sovereign!

124791055.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_C
124791055.transcript: Fancy a final dance with me?

125250778.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
125250778.transcript: One might mistake it as a primeval god, if not for its lack of life.

126363115.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0200
126363115.transcript: The sword veil could cut their teeth on these rabble.

129776034.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_B
129776034.transcript: Our fiery spirits shall subdue the chill, won't they, Gallanza?

132895194.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
132895194.transcript: And now, we arrive at the final scene!

135962590.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_9st_1_FIRST
135962590.transcript: It's but a mere shade of Id.

139603570.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0200
139603570.transcript: My dear, you have fine coordination.

144830917.label: PL2500_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_B
144830917.transcript: Watch them! Every foe has a tell!

149340249.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
149340249.transcript: The veil's secret technique is quite the sight, no?

165454556.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
165454556.transcript: You fight beautifully. I find myself almost bewitched.

165681334.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
165681334.transcript: Id, let me shoulder some of that burden.

171801959.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0800
171801959.transcript: Shall we up the tempo? But only if you can manage it.

171876119.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0600
171876119.transcript: I do appreciate the support, Rosetta.

179524192.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_C
179524192.transcript: Is it vacancy that drives you, or merely naivety?

182022681.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
182022681.transcript: I do apologize, but we've places to be.

182711044.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_A
182711044.transcript: No one knows myself better than I.

185624017.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
185624017.transcript: I say we do black tea for our next soiree.

190135654.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
190135654.transcript: Vane, I am not so fragile as to require constant protection.

191606390.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
191606390.transcript: Id, you must retain your wits!

197155250.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1000
197155250.transcript: The Swordveil guards its secrets closely, but you're always welcome to watch.

204431948.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
204431948.transcript: Might I borrow Flamemac for inspection, you see?

206662685.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
206662685.transcript: Come, knight! The next stage awaits!

207707022.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600
207707022.transcript: Dearest Zeta, we'll kindly discuss this matter later.

210324689.label: PL2500_vo_ETC_quest_start_3
210324689.transcript: Now, show me to the stage!

219209316.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
219209316.transcript: The heat of your passion is a sight to behold!

220807372.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0000
220807372.transcript: Excuse me, but please focus on the battle.

224914738.label: PL2500_vo_NAV_just_move_reaction_PL1900_3
224914738.transcript: Right in the nick of time!

226551339.label: PL2500_vo_SP_charge_speak_2
226551339.transcript: Yes! Dance for me! Delight in the battle!

227473839.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0600
227473839.transcript: Each sword bears a precious memory, so you're not far off.

227936471.label: PL2500_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_PL2400_2
227936471.transcript: That will be the last rendition!

231492570.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
231492570.transcript: I am? I mean... Why yes, I am!

232653474.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
232653474.transcript: Is that so? Shall we test that bold proclamation?

232705123.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
232705123.transcript: Hmm. Now just who do you remind me of?

238605093.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B
238605093.transcript: Your attacks are as empty as your husk!

251338577.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
251338577.transcript: Come now, your lies are as bad as your acting.

254428036.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
254428036.transcript: I'll see you safely home! I swear it!

257091323.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1200
257091323.transcript: You're as strong as you are steadfast.

263826908.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
263826908.transcript: Ugh. What a delightful little place.

265053954.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1200
265053954.transcript: You see, the sword veil's mastery of bladecraft is without parallel.

268866141.label: PL2500_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_PL2400_3
268866141.transcript: I'll not make that mistake again!

274662081.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
274662081.transcript: My blades will signal your end!

275695481.label: PL2500_vo_NAV_enemy_break_C
275695481.transcript: Our dirge shall lay them to rest!

277347904.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
277347904.transcript: Maggie-hun? Surely I deserve a more dignified title.

282963607.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_1st_1_FIRST
282963607.transcript: Swiftly! We haven't a moment to spare!

287004624.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
287004624.transcript: Oh, I very much doubt that flame as you'd like!

293341308.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_A
293341308.transcript: Don't let up! Pierce our foes!

303420487.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0300
303420487.transcript: Do be careful. I can't promise my blades fly true in the heat of battle.

303444828.label: PL2500_vo_SP_charge_speak_3
303444828.transcript: Do enjoy yourselves to the fullest!

305735044.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
305735044.transcript: Sustain your efforts until the finale!

306422551.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0900
306422551.transcript: Now, crush them under your heel!

310764308.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0000
310764308.transcript: I look forward to seeing your growth.

312864079.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0800
312864079.transcript: So long as you escort me there.

315349495.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0500
315349495.transcript: It's like you see the future!

320580291.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
320580291.transcript: Where is my due credit, you glory hog?

322753523.label: PL2500_vo_ETC_quest_start_2
322753523.transcript: Come! The curtains are ready to rise!

325550701.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
325550701.transcript: Blade and Whip, an effective combination!

328293098.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0500
328293098.transcript: Not even a single foe escapes your sight.

329944415.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_2
329944415.transcript: Let us show them the extent of our strength!

332107604.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
332107604.transcript: You needn't hold back on my account! Do your worst!

334725665.label: PL2500_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL2400_3
334725665.transcript: Must you be so frivolous, Gallo?

335660584.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_2
335660584.transcript: They'll fall to our superior weaponry!

342983909.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2300
342983909.transcript: We're both airborne fighters. Careful that we don't collide.

344190121.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
344190121.transcript: Our Waltz of Warriors reaches its climax!

352449659.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_1_FIRST
352449659.transcript: Step aside! I've no time for you!

354917914.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0500
354917914.transcript: You wouldn't be the first, nor the last.

360921033.label: PL2500_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_A
360921033.transcript: Be vigilant! They mean to kill!

363242084.label: PL2500_vo_ETC_quest_clear_2
363242084.transcript: Now then, come rest with me.

365100894.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
365100894.transcript: All legends must end. Time to close this chapter.

368640913.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1300
368640913.transcript: There is no arrangement I cannot follow.

370777606.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
370777606.transcript: Was I a little too eager?

377626988.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1700
377626988.transcript: You insist you can't feel pain, but that's all the more reason to take care of yourself.

387661207.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
387661207.transcript: Rackam, might I suggest not charging into certain death?

390916610.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1900
390916610.transcript: We make quite the duet, don't we?

397494175.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1100
397494175.transcript: The Dragonslayer... You've truly earned that title.

401204501.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A
401204501.transcript: The act doesn't end until the curtain falls!

404629585.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
404629585.transcript: Seems you've grown accustomed to teamwork.

405371072.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
405371072.transcript: The reputation of the Sword Veil rests on my shoulders!

406863809.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0700
406863809.transcript: Oh, sorry dear, I seem to have frightened the poor creature.

411925020.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
411925020.transcript: I can't bear to see you suffer any longer.

413915566.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1600
413915566.transcript: The mighty spear of Arvess... Might I have a closer look?

421213456.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
421213456.transcript: There's no need to draw this out, Lilith.

424838298.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
424838298.transcript: What a tremendous display of power!

427213994.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1500
427213994.transcript: Fist of the Red Lotus. It has a certain je ne sais quoi, doesn't it?

428782154.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
428782154.transcript: I see what you're insinuating, and no, you may not study me.

431895760.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000
431895760.transcript: Do not belittle the swordplay of the Vale.

437666375.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_1
437666375.transcript: Our performance has only just begun!

444022526.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
444022526.transcript: Perhaps your last strike was a bit too indulgent.

444251474.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
444251474.transcript: Happy to know that I am needed.

446468230.label: PL2500_vo_MOV_wait_A
446468230.transcript: Hm hm hm hm hm hm hm hm hm hm hm hm

458944741.label: PL2500_vo_ETC_quest_clear_1
458944741.transcript: Ah, all's well that ends well.

464572227.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_A
464572227.transcript: I understand, Id. I truly do. That's why I'll stop you!

464745289.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
464745289.transcript: Truly, that appetite of yours is monstrous!

467182678.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0500
467182678.transcript: Perfect cover fire! Let us see more!

478265643.label: PL2500_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL1900_3
478265643.transcript: Id, I know you're made of much sterner stuff!

484981879.label: PL2500_vo_NAV_hp_down_reaction_1
484981879.transcript: Allow me to handle the rest.

485205447.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_C
485205447.transcript: Don't forget the better part of valor!

490541249.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
490541249.transcript: Then let my blades shine even more brilliantly!

494992044.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
494992044.transcript: Indeed, we make a brilliant combination!

499419151.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
499419151.transcript: Finally, someone who has a little taste.

506918293.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
506918293.transcript: That's right, Ferry! Wield your whip like a maestro!

508375614.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
508375614.transcript: Closing this act are Maglielle, commander of the Swordveil Fellowship, and...

512084435.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
512084435.transcript: Mind the ooze! The cleaning would be dreadful!

515710790.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_fullchain
515710790.transcript: Such is the heart of the sword veil!

517166499.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
517166499.transcript: Your arrows came just in the nick of time!

517969182.label: PL2500_vo_DUO_rescue2_A
517969182.transcript: The finale is yet to come!

536679165.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2100
536679165.transcript: After the fighting has ceased, I'll put on a pot of tea.

543415193.label: PL2500_vo_NAV_get_snp_1
543415193.transcript: You may join my fellowship, little friend!

547510933.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_C
547510933.transcript: We come to the finale of this farce!

549111603.label: PL2500_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL2400_2
549111603.transcript: There's a time and a place for games.

551014330.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0000
551014330.transcript: Might I have a closer look at the Sword of Eos?

551681311.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
551681311.transcript: When did you join the fray?

555090207.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
555090207.transcript: Ah, but your magic sword is a work of art too, my dear!

557400935.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1700
557400935.transcript: Even for a giraffe, your strength is something else.

558828810.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
558828810.transcript: Now on to the next act!

560348645.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
560348645.transcript: At least my blades don't move faster than the eye can follow. How do you achieve that speed?

562444605.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
562444605.transcript: That sword of yours... You must cherish it greatly.

565236999.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
565236999.transcript: To look upon myself and know I must strike her down.

566218052.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0400
566218052.transcript: Very good, Io! That is the proper way to address a superlative weapon!

567670050.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
567670050.transcript: Twas only the blade work of the sword Veil.

576942980.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1000
576942980.transcript: Come! Our path is paved by victory!

578583095.label: PL2500_vo_NAV_hp_down_reaction_2
578583095.transcript: I'll get you on your feet!

581711830.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
581711830.transcript: You laid the groundwork. I merely followed.

583200624.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
583200624.transcript: An encore is warranted after that grand display!

586025689.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0200
586025689.transcript: Understood. I shall put my trust in your hands.

590492576.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0000
590492576.transcript: Shall we pick up the tempo?

594921107.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
594921107.transcript: Yes, I shall join your assault no matter where it's launched!

595023642.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
595023642.transcript: You make quite the chivalrous escort, sir knight!

597829436.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2600
597829436.transcript: I appreciate a warrior who's confident in her weapon.

603748665.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2700
603748665.transcript: Yes. If only we could find but a moment's respite.

608002400.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
608002400.transcript: The magnum opus of Lilith's salvation, just as vile as its creator!

617847328.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
617847328.transcript: Once more, I find myself in your debt, Sir Siegfried.

620617878.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
620617878.transcript: Don't tell me you've forgotten your dear Maggie!

627264546.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
627264546.transcript: When Vale and Wolf hunt as a pack!

627362796.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1300
627362796.transcript: How I appreciate your reinforcement, Yodarha!

631540735.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
631540735.transcript: You look like the flower, but are the serpent underneath.

632205769.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_A
632205769.transcript: Even you know you're being driven into a corner!

633455901.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
633455901.transcript: I sense a measure of elegance behind your spearwork.

636909604.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
636909604.transcript: Your will does not waver, nor your blade.

639752257.label: PL2500_vo_ETC_lockon_5
639752257.transcript: This shall be your last dance!

645333267.label: PL2500_vo_ETC_comeback_3
645333267.transcript: Fear not, I can handle myself!

647099196.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1700
647099196.transcript: You wield that scythe so deftly, yet I sense great burdens buried within.

647548314.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
647548314.transcript: I'm just pleased to have your favor.

650383492.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_C
650383492.transcript: My blades shall carve us a path!

657093973.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
657093973.transcript: Fear not! I stand ever at the ready!

657556804.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0600
657556804.transcript: Indeed, let us carry this energy into Act Two!

662773470.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2900
662773470.transcript: Even in the darkest abyss, you would have my aid.

667605316.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
667605316.transcript: Thank you for the follow-up, Cagliostro.

671851925.label: PL2500_vo_DUO_rescue1_C_PL2400_2
671851925.transcript: Come! Let us sound the horns of reprisal!

672972817.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
672972817.transcript: Oh, me? I've never been so flattered.

676079598.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
676079598.transcript: Perfection! I do hope to see more of your handiwork in the future!

679598035.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
679598035.transcript: What an honor to dance this duet with a true hero!

682775075.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0700
682775075.transcript: I must say, your pack is quite affectionate.

692467738.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
692467738.transcript: Your support is most reassuring. Thank you.

692803520.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
692803520.transcript: A most fitting finale if ever there were one.

699242182.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
699242182.transcript: I'm afraid I'm not worthy of such praise.

699935285.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
699935285.transcript: Thank you for the support, Ferry!

709371999.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1200
709371999.transcript: Thank you for your cooperation, Dame Charlotta.

710366671.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1400
710366671.transcript: Let's press on while we have the advantage.

716924006.label: PL2500_vo_ETC_lockon_4
716924006.transcript: In the name of the sword veil!

719050902.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_C
719050902.transcript: Let us regale our audience with bravura!

719216267.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
719216267.transcript: You would go to such lengths... Your heart is clear.

727399059.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_FIRST
727399059.transcript: I woke Excalibur, so I shall lay it to rest!

733839046.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0900
733839046.transcript: We'll have this riffraff sorted before afternoon tea.

735816598.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_B
735816598.transcript: Spare no effort in the search.

738007803.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600
738007803.transcript: It helps that you're not the only spear wielder I've fought with.

739829261.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
739829261.transcript: Does it suddenly feel suffocating to anyone else?

739930405.label: PL2500_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_PL1900_2
739930405.transcript: Much depends on the partner after all.

744128415.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
744128415.transcript: Well, when the mood strikes, one must bring the storm!

747903759.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2900
747903759.transcript: The godlike power of the six dragons... I scarcely believe it!

751613369.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
751613369.transcript: I could say the same of you, my dear.

756986063.label: PL2500_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_3
756986063.transcript: Let us repay our foes in kind!

757371546.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0000
757371546.transcript: Aren't you just full of vigor?

762094899.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_3chain_2
762094899.transcript: We gave them the show of their lives!

765101042.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
765101042.transcript: Don't be silly. I do the protecting around here.

768896571.label: PL2500_vo_ETC_box_check_l_1
768896571.transcript: Mmm, this is quite the find!

770659886.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1800
770659886.transcript: Alchemy and blade, a deadly combination, wouldn't you agree?

775457082.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2800
775457082.transcript: As the face of the Sword Veil, I aim to deliver!

779641793.label: PL2500_vo_DUO_rescue1_B_PL2400
779641793.transcript: That's why you must be careful!

781790460.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1800
781790460.transcript: I wasn't aware alchemy could be so swift.

788283899.label: PL2500_vo_DUO_rescue1_B_PL1900_2
788283899.transcript: Oh, Id, you mustn't fly too high!

791547660.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
791547660.transcript: Where did you learn such fanciful footwork?

794296225.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
794296225.transcript: It wasn't even my finest display.

802511052.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
802511052.transcript: But of course! Who do you think you're talking to?

810158486.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
810158486.transcript: In which case, I'll rain swords upon them!

810195119.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0200
810195119.transcript: Perhaps none embody a knight's honor as well as you.

811936748.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
811936748.transcript: I see it now. Astrals are indeed formidable.

828773018.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST
828773018.transcript: Your tenacity truly knows no bounds.

828948150.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_A
828948150.transcript: How will you lot handle us?

841302157.label: PL2500_vo_NAV_throw_slow_reaction_3
841302157.transcript: Catch me if you can, dear!

841656764.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0200
841656764.transcript: The noble Reculsa... Such a glorious blade...

846325126.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
846325126.transcript: Combat proficiency is required to helm the fellowship.

849043326.label: PL2500_vo_MOV_wait_A_2
849043326.transcript: Hoo hoo hoo hoo hoo hoo!

852857116.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0400
852857116.transcript: Oh, I'm thrilled you're enjoying yourself.

853717563.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A
853717563.transcript: You've chosen an ignoble death, Lilith!

854163022.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
854163022.transcript: An eternal never disappoints. Excellent follow-through.

856248198.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
856248198.transcript: Well, if you insist, I suppose that could be arranged.

856931180.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
856931180.transcript: How unfortunate. I wanted another dance.

858623100.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2600
858623100.transcript: So your sword... it feasts on fate, does it?

861081325.label: PL2500_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_2
861081325.transcript: Be sure to keep your limits in mind.

864744825.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
864744825.transcript: Oh, ensorcelled blades, deliver us from peril and dance upon our foes!

869229508.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0400
869229508.transcript: Oh, blades of yore, encircle our foes and sunder them in twain!

869521079.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
869521079.transcript: I disagree. One must always strive for eternal perfection.

870308205.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2400
870308205.transcript: No one can stand against the might of our formation!

870666495.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_C
870666495.transcript: Let us join blades and strike!

883261021.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1600
883261021.transcript: Pancakes? A bold challenge! I gladly accept!

885047194.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
885047194.transcript: If only I could simply teach you all to fly!

894646509.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
894646509.transcript: Enchanted blade and fluttering sword. Quite the beautiful pair.

896107187.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1800
896107187.transcript: That saccharine tone doesn't inspire much confidence.

903322593.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
903322593.transcript: If you must know, I'm a solo act.

904162887.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2800
904162887.transcript: Gorgeous! Like a flower blooming upon the battlefield!

904849469.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_A
904849469.transcript: I see you're still as stubborn as ever.

906239242.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0800
906239242.transcript: You wield those dual blades with aplomb!

907060783.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
907060783.transcript: Oh, I've heard tell, but to see a six dragon at work!

911885485.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
911885485.transcript: This is the true Especial de Maglielle!

914733294.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
914733294.transcript: No no, I say we play an Accelerando!

918772015.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
918772015.transcript: Well, I suppose that attack was passable.

934586246.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2600
934586246.transcript: Embrask deserves a worthy wielder, and you qualify!

937092390.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
937092390.transcript: I shall take that as a compliment.

938078257.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0900
938078257.transcript: Room for one more? I'll bring tea leaves that are to die for.

944451156.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
944451156.transcript: Oh, Id! You can hear us, can't you?

948929928.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0600
948929928.transcript: To fight alongside a primeval god... what a privilege!

950410125.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_5st_1_FIRST
950410125.transcript: Oh my... If only I'd foreseen Lilith's true intentions then...

951773479.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
951773479.transcript: Such majestic swords! And multitudes of them no less! I find myself positively enraptured!

952109677.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
952109677.transcript: We were in perfect sync, were we not?

954997797.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
954997797.transcript: Do bring that vigor to the next stage.

955030261.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0000
955030261.transcript: I'm elated to have earned your trust.

956752834.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2600
956752834.transcript: That was a bit boisterous, but it certainly got the job done.

957519328.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0000
957519328.transcript: Your words of praise honor me.

961205377.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_B
961205377.transcript: Follow my lead, if you please!

964954964.label: PL2500_vo_DUO_rescue1_B_PL1900_3
964954964.transcript: Audacity courts bravery in one hand and death in the other.

970416069.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_B
970416069.transcript: Can you withstand our surging symphony?

970729288.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0700
970729288.transcript: Not to worry! My next performance is coming soon!

977807194.label: PL2500_vo_NAV_throw_slow_reaction_1
977807194.transcript: I'll stop them in their tracks!

982202956.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_1_FIRST
982202956.transcript: Id, see the truth for what it is!

983152435.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
983152435.transcript: To think an eternal would grace me with such praise. I'm elated!

988543449.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0400
988543449.transcript: Such elegant, refined magic. I'm impressed, Io.

989363164.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
989363164.transcript: The fanfare of blades and arrows! What a spectacular melody!

998208944.label: PL2500_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_C
998208944.transcript: So, we've come to the third act.

1005019913.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_2_FIRST
1005019913.transcript: Using a primeval god as a mere decoy? How irreverent.

1006140481.label: PL2500_vo_ATK_ability_8_2
1006140481.transcript: Bear witness to the heart of the veil!

1006225296.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
1006225296.transcript: Oh my, now I feel positively dizzy!

1021689643.label: PL2500_vo_ATK_ability_8_1
1021689643.transcript: Oh, blades of yore, I call ye!

1024410218.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
1024410218.transcript: You'll cling to your sword until the bitter end!

1029548187.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_FIRST
1029548187.transcript: So you thought to affirm your raison d'être by completing your mission?

1035419622.label: PL2500_vo_ATK_sp_shoot_3
1035419622.transcript: My darlings, show them your splendor!

1035484461.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
1035484461.transcript: Princess? I rather like the sound of that.

1036762009.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
1036762009.transcript: Opt for its legs! That's the usual weak point!

1039778479.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0600
1039778479.transcript: What a refined aroma! Excellent taste, my dear!

1041947648.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2800
1041947648.transcript: Show no mercy to those who would oppose us!

1050726359.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
1050726359.transcript: I see why you're called the Lord of Flames.

1053448310.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
1053448310.transcript: What are allies for, my dear?

1055598960.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
1055598960.transcript: Hooray! What in the skies am I doing?

1056498587.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
1056498587.transcript: Do be darlings and stand down!

1060906892.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300
1060906892.transcript: Now, shall we proceed to the final act?

1064958170.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
1064958170.transcript: Ever grander stages await! Let us play just as beautifully!

1068465043.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
1068465043.transcript: How sharp! I've never heard joke scimitar to that one!

1070330377.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
1070330377.transcript: I appreciate the kind words, Sir Vane.

1073582040.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
1073582040.transcript: A blade bereft of spirit shan't pierce me!
